summary: The diff shows only backend code modifications (backend/main.mo) and project state tracking. No documentation files were created. All four documentation requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-4) are missing from the implementation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Create comprehensive documentation explaining the backend folder structure related to Assessment and Wellness Reports, including the purpose and function of each folder and file

evidence: No added files in diff summary
Only modified files are backend/main.mo and project_state.json

missing_requirements.requirement: Documentation is provided in both English and Hindi

evidence: backend/main.mo contains code but no accompanying documentation
